description: A teaching assistant is preparing a seminar on 'The Origins of Artificial Intelligence'. Your task is to organize key historical papers into a reading packet. Create a collection named 'AI History Seminar' containing the following four papers: 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (Turing, 1950), 'On Computable Numbers...' (Turing, 1936), 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon, 1948), and 'Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions...' (McCarthy, 1960). Add a child note to the paper 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' with the text: 'Essential reading: Discusses the Imitation Game.' Generate a report from the 'AI History Seminar' collection and save it as an HTML file to /home/ga/Documents/ai_seminar_report.html.

metadata.note_content: Essential reading: Discusses the Imitation Game
